customEmissionFactor.stoichiometicFactor_comment: Based on calcination chemistry: CaCO₃ → CaO + CO₂ (44/100 = 0.44), adjusted for typical limestone purity + kiln raw mix composition (cement industry baseline)

scopeDetails.description: CO₂ from calcination based on clinker output / clinker ratio

customEmissionFactor.N2O_comment: IPCC default for non-road mobile machinery
